rotation_policy: weekly review on Friday afternoon (Yuki's no-pay hours). Add via PR to needs_now.json — silent commit, no announcement.
priority_signal: Higher urgency_score = more in need RIGHT NOW. Score is a snapshot, not historical importance. Recalibrated weekly.
default_route: When customer picks 'route to where most needed', donation flows to the top-ranked entry (urgency_score desc). If top is capped, falls through to #2.

needs.name: 弟子屈町 (Teshikaga, Hokkaido)
needs.why_now_ja: MU origin city。地方創生・教育・武道文化の継承拠点。企業版ふるさと納税認定で実質負担 ~10%。
needs.why_now_en: MU origin city. Funding regional revitalization, education, and martial-arts heritage. Corporate hometown-tax certified — effective cost ~10% of donation.

needs.name: Sen-Dojo (柔道・柔術武道支援)
needs.why_now_ja: 公益認定済の道場ネットワーク。子供・低所得家庭向け道場費補助。MU Foundation 設立後の主要 grant 先候補。
needs.why_now_en: Certified dojo network. Subsidizes dojo fees for kids and low-income families. Primary grant target after MU Foundation founding.

needs.name: 港区社会福祉協議会 こども宅食
needs.name_en: Minato-ku Council of Social Welfare — Children's Home-Delivered Meals
needs.why_now_ja: 三田周辺の困窮家庭への食事配達。継続的に資金不足、シーズン特に冬・春休み期に需要急増。
needs.why_now_en: Meal delivery for households in need around Mita. Chronically underfunded; demand spikes in winter and spring breaks.

needs.name: SJJJF (柔術連盟) 公益法人化
needs.why_now_ja: 公益法人化の手続き費用と理事会運営費。完了後は地方道場・選手助成の主体に。
needs.why_now_en: Filing costs and board operating expenses for transition to a public-interest corporation. After completion, becomes a primary granter to regional dojos and athletes.
needs.channel: 賛助会員 / 法人寄付

needs.name: YAWARA道場 (山口・李英俊)
needs.why_now_ja: 地方道場の運営継続。村田・粟田・濱田の長期パートナー。設備更新と若手選手強化費。
needs.why_now_en: Sustaining a regional dojo's operation. Long-term partner with Murata / Awata / Hamada. Equipment renewal and young-athlete support.
needs.channel: 直接寄付 / Pro Bono Tier

_note_ja: 「最も静かに、最も多くを他者に流す」(§29)。urgency_score は週次で見直す。受益者個人 ID は出さない、組織名のみ。
_note_en: 'Flow the most, most quietly' (§29). urgency_score is re-rated weekly. Beneficiary individual IDs are never published — organization names only.
